evals.prompt: Design agent-native capabilities for our task management app. Every action a user can do in the UI (create project, assign task, set due date, add comment, change status), an agent should be able to do via MCP tools. Create the parity map.
evals.expected_output: UI-to-tool parity map with atomic tool definitions for every user action

assertions.name: parity_map
assertions.description: Table mapping each UI action to a corresponding MCP tool

assertions.name: tool_definitions
assertions.description: Each tool has name, parameters, and description

assertions.name: crud_coverage
assertions.description: Create, read, update, delete covered for each entity

assertions.name: 100_percent_parity
assertions.description: No UI action without a corresponding tool

assertions.name: parameter_design
assertions.description: Parameters use string descriptions, not enums (for agent flexibility)

evals.prompt: Design MCP tool definitions for a content management system. Entities: Article, Category, Author, Media. Each entity needs CRUD tools plus: Article needs publish/unpublish, Media needs upload/resize.
evals.expected_output: MCP tool definitions with Zod schemas for each entity's operations

assertions.name: entity_tools
assertions.description: CRUD tools for all 4 entities

assertions.name: article_publish
assertions.description: publish_article and unpublish_article tools defined

assertions.name: media_upload
assertions.description: upload_media and resize_media tools defined

assertions.name: zod_schemas
assertions.description: Parameters defined with Zod schemas and .describe()

assertions.name: error_responses
assertions.description: Error handling documented for each tool

evals.prompt: Design shared workspace patterns for our project. Agents and users should operate on the same data (same DB tables, no shadow data). Define how agents read context and write changes.
evals.expected_output: Shared workspace design with read patterns, write patterns, and conflict resolution

assertions.name: shared_database
assertions.description: Agents use the same database tables as the UI

assertions.name: read_patterns
assertions.description: How agents discover and read existing data

assertions.name: write_patterns
assertions.description: How agents create and modify data through tools

assertions.name: no_shadow_data
assertions.description: No separate agent-only data stores

assertions.name: conflict_resolution
assertions.description: How to handle concurrent agent and user modifications

evals.prompt: Design dynamic context injection for our agents. When an agent starts working on a task, it should automatically receive: the current project context, relevant recent changes, applicable business rules, and user preferences.
evals.expected_output: Context injection design with data sources, assembly logic, and token budget management

assertions.name: context_sources
assertions.description: Lists what context data to inject (project, changes, rules, preferences)

assertions.name: assembly_logic
assertions.description: How context is gathered and assembled into the agent's prompt

assertions.name: token_management
assertions.description: Strategy for staying within token limits

assertions.name: relevance_filtering
assertions.description: Only injects context relevant to the current task

assertions.name: freshness
assertions.description: Context reflects current state, not stale data

evals.prompt: Design the capability-map.md parity tracker for our application. It should show: total UI actions, total agent tools, parity percentage, and which actions are missing agent coverage.
evals.expected_output: Capability map template with coverage metrics and gap identification

assertions.name: coverage_metrics
assertions.description: Total UI actions, total tools, parity percentage calculated

assertions.name: per_entity_coverage
assertions.description: Parity tracked per entity (users, projects, tasks, etc.)

assertions.name: gap_identification
assertions.description: Missing tools explicitly listed

assertions.name: priority_ranking
assertions.description: Gaps ranked by importance/frequency of the UI action

assertions.name: maintenance_process
assertions.description: Process for updating the map when new features are added
